Businesses across the GCC are all asking the same question: how do you actually integrate humanoid technology into your operations? Not as a proof of concept, but as a functioning, revenue-generating part of your business.

Mangobot was built to answer that question.

Founded in Dubai in 2023, Mangobot is the UAE's dedicated humanoid robotics deployment and operations company. We source the world's most advanced robots, configure them for each client's brand and environment through our proprietary platform LinkSoul, and manage every aspect of their deployment. Businesses gain a seamless, high-impact robotic presence without needing to become robotics experts.

## What We Do

We deploy and operate humanoid robots at scale. We source best-in-class hardware from global technology partners, configure each robot through LinkSoul **which controls personality, voice, language, knowledge base, and movement** and provide full on-site operational support for every deployment. Every robot feels like it belongs to the client.


## Our Robot Lineup

Mangobot currently operates a fleet of six advanced robots, each designed for specific deployment environments.

### A2 Ultra

<img 
  src="/markdown/imgs/LA_08924.JPG" 
  width="100%" 
  style="border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"
/>

The A2 Ultra is Mangobot's flagship humanoid, built for natural conversation, fluid movement, and intelligent navigation. Standing 169cm tall, with support for 20+ languages, autonomous 360° perception, and ultra-realistic speech powered by iFLYTEK, it excels in hospitality, front desk, brand ambassador, and event MC roles.

### X2 Series (X2 and X2 Ultra)

<img 
  src="/markdown/imgs/LA_09032.JPG" 
  width="100%" 
  style="border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"
/>

The X2 Series covers two variants built for real-world performance. The X2 delivers expressive movement and lifelike interaction for performance-led environments. The X2 Ultra adds full sensor integration and advanced autonomous operation for high-complexity deployments. Both are powered by embodied AI and engineered for crowd engagement.

### D1 Ultra

<img 
  src="/markdown/imgs/image-11.jpg" 
  width="100%" 
  style="border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"
/>

A compact 15kg quadruped moving at 3.7 m/s. The D1 Ultra climbs stairs, navigates complex terrain, and carries up to 10kg. Built for patrol, inspection, and multi-scenario operations across warehouses, campuses, and critical infrastructure.

### D1 Max

<img 
  src="/markdown/imgs/image-12.jpg" 
  width="100%" 
  style="border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"
/>

Carries 30kg at over 4 m/s on legs and 8 m/s on wheels. IP67 rated with hot-swappable batteries for continuous missions. Suited for surveillance, infrastructure inspection, on-site logistics, and emergency support.

### D1 Max Pro

<img 
  src="/markdown/imgs/image-13.jpg" 
  width="100%" 
  style="border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);"
/>

Built for the most demanding industrial operations. Carries up to 100kg, runs for 5.5 hours, and operates across temperatures from -20°C to 55°C. Designed for heavy-duty industrial inspections, large-area patrol, and emergency deployment.

### G2

The G2 is an industrial-grade humanoid built for scalable real-world deployment. Equipped with 7-DOF force-controlled arms, 360° perception, and embodied AI, it delivers precise, safe, and continuous performance across manufacturing, logistics, and commercial environments.

Explore the full [Mangobot robot lineup](/products) and technical specifications


## World-Class Technology Partners

The quality of a deployment is only as strong as the technology behind it. Mangobot works with some of the most respected names in global robotics and AI.

Our humanoid hardware is supplied by [AgiBot](https://www.agibot.com/), one of China's most advanced robot manufacturers. **Huawei** powers the AI infrastructure and connectivity across our fleet. **iFLYTEK** delivers the ultra-realistic multilingual voice capabilities that make our robots compelling to interact with across 20+ languages

These partnerships are why Mangobot's robots perform at the level they do, and why clients across the region trust us to deliver.

## Built for the GCC, Ready for the World

The GCC is one of the fastest-moving markets in the world for advanced technology adoption. Mangobot was built specifically for this environment: sourcing globally, operating locally, and deploying with precision.

Humanoid robots are no longer a future investment. They are a deployable, revenue-generating asset available to your business today.The region's boldest businesses are already deploying. The window to be among the first is still open.
